# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

```yaml
variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 0
  MR_TITLE: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}
  MR_DESCRIPTION: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}
  MR_IID: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}
  MR_SOURCE_BRANCH: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}
  MR_TARGET_BRANCH: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify
  - release-notes

.mr_context: &mr_context
  before_script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        echo "=== Merge Request Context ==="
        echo "MR Title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        echo "MR IID: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
        echo "MR Source Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME"
        echo "MR Target Branch: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME"
        echo "MR Description:"
        echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        echo "============================"
        
        export SANITIZED_MR_TITLE=$(echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/-/g' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
        export SHORT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
        export DEPLOYMENT_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${SHORT_SHA}-mr${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}-${SANITIZED_MR_TITLE}"
      else
        echo "Not running in merge request context"
        export SANITIZED_MR_TITLE="direct-commit"
        export SHORT_SHA=${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
        export DEPLOYMENT_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-${SHORT_SHA}"
      fi
      echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"

extract_mr_info:
  stage: prepare
  <<: *mr_context
  script:
    - mkdir -p build_metadata
    - |
      cat > build_metadata/mr_info.json <<EOF
      {
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-null}",
        "mr_title": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}",
        "mr_description": $(echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description}" | jq -Rs .),
        "mr_source_branch": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME:-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}",
        "mr_target_branch": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME:-N/A}",
        "commit_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHA",
        "commit_short_sha": "$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA",
        "pipeline_id": "$CI_PIPELINE_ID",
        "deployment_tag": "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG",
        "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      }
      EOF
    - cat build_metadata/mr_info.json
    - echo "MR_TITLE=$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" >> build_metadata/env.txt
    - echo "DEPLOYMENT_TAG=$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" >> build_metadata/env.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build_metadata/
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

build_application:
  stage: build
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - echo "Building application..."
    - echo "Feature: ${MR_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
    - |
      cat > build_info.txt <<EOF
      Build Information
      =================
      Feature: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}
      MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}
      Branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      Tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      Built at: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
      EOF
    - cat build_info.txt
    - mkdir -p dist
    - echo "Application built successfully" > dist/app.txt
    - cp build_info.txt dist/
    - cp build_metadata/mr_info.json dist/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build_info.txt
      - build_metadata/
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

test_application:
  stage: test
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - echo "Testing feature: ${MR_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - |
      cat > test_results.json <<EOF
      {
        "feature": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}",
        "mr_iid": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-null}",
        "tests_passed": 42,
        "tests_failed": 0,
        "coverage": "95%",
        "timestamp": "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      }
      EOF
    - cat test_results.json
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - test_results.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH'

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - test_application
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - echo "Deploying to staging..."
    - echo "Feature: ${MR_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
    - echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - |
      cat > deployment_manifest.yaml <<EOF
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: app-staging
        labels:
          app: myapp
          environment: staging
          mr-iid: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-none}"
          deployment-tag: "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
        annotations:
          feature: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
          mr-description: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description}"
          deployed-by: "${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}"
          deployed-at: "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
      spec:
        replicas: 2
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: myapp
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: myapp
              version: "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: app
              image: registry.example.com/myapp:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
              env:
              - name: FEATURE_NAME
                value: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
              - name: MR_IID
                value: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-0}"
      EOF
    - cat deployment_manifest.yaml
    - echo "Deployment to staging completed"
    - echo "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" > deployment_tag.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_manifest.yaml
      - deployment_tag.txt
    expire_in: 1 week
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - test_application
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - echo "Deploying to production..."
    - echo "Feature: ${MR_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
    - echo "Deployment Tag: $DEPLOYMENT_TAG"
    - |
      cat > production_deployment.yaml <<EOF
      apiVersion: v1
      kind: Deployment
      metadata:
        name: app-production
        labels:
          app: myapp
          environment: production
          mr-iid: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-none}"
          deployment-tag: "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
        annotations:
          feature: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
          mr-description: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description}"
          deployed-by: "${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}"
          deployed-at: "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          release-notes: "auto-generated"
      spec:
        replicas: 5
        selector:
          matchLabels:
            app: myapp
        template:
          metadata:
            labels:
              app: myapp
              version: "${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
          spec:
            containers:
            - name: app
              image: registry.example.com/myapp:${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
              env:
              - name: FEATURE_NAME
                value: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
              - name: MR_IID
                value: "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-0}"
      EOF
    - cat production_deployment.yaml
    - echo "Production deployment completed"
    - echo "$DEPLOYMENT_TAG" > production_deployment_tag.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - production_deployment.yaml
      - production_deployment_tag.txt
    expire_in: 1 month
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'
      when: manual
  needs:
    - build_application
    - test_application

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  image: curlimages/curl:latest
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - deploy_staging
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        DESCRIPTION_PREVIEW=$(echo "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description}" | head -c 200)
        
        curl -X POST "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" \
          -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          -d @- <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Notification",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🚀 Deployment to Staging"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Feature:*\n${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*MR:*\n#${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Branch:*\n${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Tag:*\n${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Deployed by:*\n${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Environment:*\nStaging"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n${DESCRIPTION_PREVIEW}..."
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "actions",
            "elements": [
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View MR"
                },
                "url": "${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_URL:-$CI_PROJECT_URL}"
              },
              {
                "type": "button",
                "text": {
                  "type": "plain_text",
                  "text": "View Pipeline"
                },
                "url": "${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
        echo "Slack notification sent"
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not set, skipping notification"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

notify_email:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache mailx
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - |
      if [ -n "$NOTIFICATION_EMAIL" ]; then
        cat > email_body.txt <<EOF
      Deployment Notification
      =======================

      A new deployment has been completed:

      Feature: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}
      MR: #${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID:-N/A}
      Branch: ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      Deployment Tag: ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      Deployed by: ${GITLAB_USER_LOGIN}
      Environment: Staging
      Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

      Description:
      ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION:-No description provided}

      Links:
      - MR: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_URL:-$CI_PROJECT_URL}
      - Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}
      - Project: ${CI_PROJECT_URL}

      ---
      This is an automated notification from GitLab CI/CD
      EOF
        
        cat email_body.txt | mail -s "[Deployment] ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE:-Direct Commit}" "$NOTIFICATION_EMAIL"
        echo "Email notification sent to $NOTIFICATION_EMAIL"
      else
        echo "NOTIFICATION_EMAIL not set, skipping email notification"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
      when: on_success
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
      when: on_success

generate_release_notes:
  stage: release-notes
  image: alpine:latest
  <<: *mr_context
  dependencies:
    - build_application
    - deploy_production
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git jq
  script:
    - source build_metadata/env.txt || true
    - |
      cat > RELEASE_NOTES.md <<EOF
      # Release Notes - $(date +%Y-%m-%d)

      ## Deployment Information
      - **Tag:** ${DEPLOYMENT_TAG}
      - **Commit:** ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}
      - **Branch:** ${CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME}
      - **Deployed by:** ${GITLAB_USER
